description: WorkloadPodGroupResourceClaim references a dynamic resource claim that is shared across pods in the group.

name.description: name uniquely identifies this resource claim inside the group. This field is required. It must be a DNS_LABEL.

resourceClaimName.description: resourceClaimName is the name of a ResourceClaim object in the same namespace. This field is optional. If it is not specified, no resource claim is used. If set, it must be a DNS subdomain.

resourceClaimTemplateName.description: resourceClaimTemplateName is the name of a ResourceClaimTemplate object in the same namespace. This field is optional. If it is not specified, no resource claim template is used. If set, it must be a DNS subdomain.
